name: python3-gssapi
title: python3-gssapi
description:
Python 3 interface to GSSAPI
Python3 Bindings for GSSAPI.  These bindings are for both RFC 2743/2744 and
many extensions.  They are native bindings produced using Cython.
.
Available extensions will vary based on what your GSSAPI implementation
supports; see package documentation for a detailed list of what is available.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gssapi because Python 3 interface to GSSAPI.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gssapi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gssapi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gssapi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
